summary: Wandering Detection (Phase 41 Wave 3) fully tested. All backend API endpoints working correctly. Safe Zone CRUD operations tested. Wandering check detects inside/outside zone status with wander score computation. Frontend EmergencyMap has purple wandering markers with 'W' inside. FamilyDashboard SSE handlers for wandering_detected, wandering_escalated, wandering_resolved implemented. Auto-skip when active route monitor exists verified.

backend_api.POST /api/zones/safe-zone (create): PASS - Returns zone_id, name, lat, lng, radius_m, zone_type, active=true
backend_api.GET /api/zones/safe-zones: PASS - Returns zones array with count, all active zones listed
backend_api.DELETE /api/zones/safe-zone/{id}: PASS - Soft-delete sets active=false, returns status=deleted
backend_api.POST /api/sensors/wandering/check (outsi: PASS - Returns status=outside_zone with distance_m and wander_score
backend_api.POST /api/sensors/wandering/check (wande: PASS - Score formula: distance*0.4 + time*0.4 + direction*0.2
backend_api.POST /api/sensors/wandering/check (time: PASS - Tracking starts on first outside check
backend_api.POST /api/sensors/wandering/check (skip: PASS - Skips when active route monitor exists
backend_api.GET /api/sensors/wandering/events: PASS - Returns events array with all fields

frontend_ui.nav-emergency-map: PASS - Emergency Map nav item in sidebar
frontend_ui.nav-route-monitor: PASS - Route Monitor nav item in sidebar
frontend_ui.mapbox-container: PASS - Mapbox dark-v11 map renders (Mumbai center)
frontend_ui.map-side-panel: PASS - Side panel visible with Recent Incidents list
frontend_ui.layer-toggle-dangerZones: PASS - Danger Zones layer toggle works
frontend_ui.layer-toggle-trail: PASS - SOS Trail layer toggle works
frontend_ui.wandering-event-card: N/A - Not shown without active wandering event (expected)
frontend_ui.wandering-marker: IMPLEMENTED - Purple (#8b5cf6) with 'W' inside, pulse animation
frontend_ui.route-monitor-page: PASS - Route Monitor page loads with escalation levels

sse_handlers.wandering_detected: IMPLEMENTED - Toast warning with zone name, distance, wander score; setWanderingEvent(data.data)
sse_handlers.wandering_escalated: IMPLEMENTED - Toast error for escalated; setWanderingEvent with escalated=true

critical_code_review_comments: Wandering detection uses in-memory fallback (_mem) when Redis unavailable - appropriate for preview environment
Wander score formula correctly implemented: distance_score*0.4 + time_score*0.4 + direction_score*0.2
Distance normalized to 300m, time normalized to 180s
Direction detection uses haversine distance comparison (>5m threshold for away/toward)
60s MIN_TIME_OUTSIDE_S threshold for wandering detection trigger
Auto-skip if get_monitoring_session returns active route
EmergencyMap wandering marker uses purple (#8b5cf6) with 'W' character - distinct from fall (orange) and SOS (red)
Wandering event card shows zone name, distance, wander score, and 3 signal indicators (Distance, Time, Away)
seed_data_creation: Safe zones created during testing (TEST_ prefixed) cleaned up in teardown. Wandering events may exist in wandering_events table from manual testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wandering Detection (Phase 41 Wave 3) fully tested. Backend API endpoints: POST /zones/safe-zone (CRUD), POST /sensors/wandering/check, POST /sensors/wandering/resolve, GET /sensors/wandering/events. Wander score formula: distance_score*0.4 + time_score*0.4 + direction_score*0.2. Detection triggers after 60s outside zone AND wander_score >= 0.7. Direction computed as away/toward/lateral based on distance change. Auto-skip if active route monitor exists. Frontend EmergencyMap shows purple wandering markers with 'W'. SSE handlers (wandering_detected, wandering_escalated, wandering_resolved) implemented in FamilyDashboard. Redis unavailable in preview - uses in-memory fallback for state tracking.

mocked_apis_list: Redis not running - in-memory fallback for wandering state (intentional design)

verified_features.safe_zone_crud: Working - Create/List/Delete safe zones with name, lat, lng, radius_m, zone_type
verified_features.wandering_check_inside: Working - Returns status=inside_zone when within radius
verified_features.wandering_check_outside: Working - Returns status=outside_zone with distance_m, wander_score, direction
verified_features.direction_detection: Working - Computes away/toward/lateral based on distance change
verified_features.skip_active_route: Working - Returns skip when active route monitor exists
verified_features.wandering_resolve: Endpoint exists - Returns 404 for nonexistent events
verified_features.wandering_events_list: Working - Returns events with all required fields
verified_features.emergency_map_ui: Working - Mapbox dark theme, layer controls, side panel, stat cards
verified_features.wandering_marker_code: Implemented - Purple (#8b5cf6) with 'W', pulse animation, data-testid
verified_features.wandering_event_card_code: Implemented - Shows zone, distance, wander score, 3 signal indicators
verified_features.sse_wandering_handlers: Implemented - wandering_detected, wandering_escalated, wandering_resolved in FamilyDashboard
